$comment: DERIVED conformance schema (NOT an official OpenAI/Codex publication). Provenance: observed Codex plugin manifests under local Codex plugin cache (openai-curated-remote/* and openai-bundled/*) plus Hyperflow packaging requirements; source docs referenced by full-codex-support research (plugin manifests, skills, hooks, marketplace lifecycle). Observed Codex CLI context: 0.141.0 (research note in .hyperflow/specs/full-codex-support.md). Retrieval date: 2026-07-18. Observed common keys: name, version, description, author, homepage, repository, license, keywords, skills, interface; optional apps, mcpServers, openaiCapabilities, bundledContentVariant. interface keys observed: displayName, shortDescription, longDescription, developerName, category, capabilities, websiteURL, privacyPolicyURL, termsOfServiceURL, defaultPrompt, brandColor, screenshots, composerIcon, logo, logoDark, brandColorDark, supportURL. Deviations from pure observation: (1) require hooks pointing at a hooks.json path for Hyperflow certified lanes (OpenAI curated samples often ship hooks.json at package root without a manifest field); (2) do not require apps, mcpServers, or asset paths (composerIcon/logo); (3) screenshots may be empty; (4) ignore openaiCapabilities/bundledContentVariant. Never label this schema 'official'.
title: Hyperflow Codex plugin manifest (derived)
description: Derived JSON Schema subset for .codex-plugin/plugin.json. Validated offline by scripts/validate-plugin.py.
